en: I was at a real low point.
ko: 나는 정말 힘든 시기를 겪고 있었어.

en: That's when I talked to my doctor about... a couple of beers.
ko: 그때 의사와 몇 잔의 맥주에 대해 이야기했어.

en: A couple of beers is a revolutionary medicine
that treats anxiety and depression fast.
And within minutes of taking it, I'm back to my old self.
ko: 약을 먹고 몇 분 안에 예전의 나로 돌아와.

en: Andrew! I love you, buddy.
You're the best in the whole world.
And my confidence is through the roof.
What are you guys laughing at, how stupid you are?
ko: 너희는 뭐가 웃겨? 너희가 얼마나 바보 같은지?

en: No! No!
Jay, you look freaking hot, man. You been doing, like, Pilates?
ko: 제이, 너 진짜 멋져 보여. 필라테스 했어?

en: Excuse me? Whoa, sorry.
I'm just having a tough time adjusting to my new medication.
So...
The way it works is simple.
A couple of beers quickly turns a cloudy, rainy day into a sunny one.
ko: 몇 잔의 맥주가 흐리고 비 오는 날을 금방 맑은 날로 바꿔.

en: It's that easy.
Now I'm the me I want to be.
And I'm not the only one who's noticed the change.
ko: 나만 변화한 걸 알아차린 게 아니야.

en: Cheryl's making me feel so bad for skipping her birthday trip, but it's like...
ko: 셰릴이 내 생일 여행을 빼먹었다고 나를 너무 나쁘게 느끼게 해, 하지만...

en: Hey, hey, hey, hey, hey.
She's just jealous because you're so beautiful.
ko: 그녀는 네가 너무 아름다워서 질투하는 거야.

en: Aww.
A couple of beers is a clinically proven treatment for conditions like boredom, depression, winter,
ko: 몇 잔의 맥주는 지루함, 우울증, 겨울,

en: museum, hangovers, affair.
ko: 박물관, 숙취, 불륜 같은 상태에 대한 임상적으로 입증된 치료법이야.
